mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, description, sort_order, name_zh, name_es, created_at, updated_at FROM categories ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, slug, description, sort_order, name_zh, name_es, created_at, updated_at FROM categories WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, slug, description, sort_order, name_zh, name_es) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{nameZh}, #{nameEs})
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name=#{name}, slug=#{slug}, description=#{description}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, name_zh=#{nameZh}, name_es=#{nameEs} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR slug LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
